title: Reusing our content | NICE
text:
Reusing our content | NICE Skip to content Accessibility help Search NICE… Skip to content Menu Sign in Guidance Standards and indicators Clinical Knowledge Summaries (CKS) British National Formulary (BNF) BNF for Children (BNFC) Life sciences More from NICE Home Reusing our content We produce a wide range of information as part of our ‘public task’ - our core role and the functions we are under a legal duty to perform.
Permission to use this information, which includes our guidance on health and social care and our corporate documents, is covered by a licensing framework dependent on where our content is to be used. Read our public task statement 
Reusing our content
Use of NICE content in the UK Syndication service application Permission request for international use of NICE content NICE content assurance service Use of our content for AI purposes Use of our content internationally Content assurance service What content is available for reuse? Is there any content I cannot reuse? NICE syndication API Public task Use of our content in the UK form All requests to use our content in a UK setting only are covered by the NICE UK Open Content Licence. This allows you to reuse our content, free of charge, subject to the terms and conditions of the licence.
Use of our content internationally Requests to use our content internationally, except for personal research and study purposes,
